description: Administrative API to send a request to analyze a skill.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

appName.description: The name of the application associated with this skill.
appName.title: appName

name.description: The name of the skill to analyze. The analysis will be sent to refractai.
name.title: name

processing.description: Type of processing for refractai. Queue means the the processing will be batched and will be done later on. Immediate skips the queue and is done as soon as possible. Finally RequireValidation will put it a queue and will require manual intervention.
processing.title: processing

repo.description: The source repo of the skill.
repo.title: repo

title: AdminSkillAnalysis
